questionHtml: Deduce how the rate of reaction at t = 2 would compare to the initial rate.
markschemeHtml:
half «of the initial rate»    [✔]

 

Note: Accept “lower/slower «than initial rate»”.

meta.title: Deduce how the rate of reaction at t = 2 would compare to the initial rate.
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 2. How much, how fast and how far?
Reactivity 2.2—How fast? The rate of chemical change
Reactivity 2.2.1—The rate of reaction is expressed as the change in concentration of a particular reactant/product per unit time.
